title: Agent spec 'model:' field semantics
context: Agent spec YAMLs may declare a model field with or without a provider prefix. packages/pi-behavior-monitors/index.ts:1173-1179 implements parseModelSpec such that bare model ids (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6') default to provider='anthropic'. This structural pin means monitor classify calls attempt Anthropic-direct authentication regardless of the main session's configured provider. Under OpenRouter-only auth (the user's current configuration), every monitor's classify call fails with 'Expected either apiKey or authToken'. Issue-062 tracks this as the forcing artifact. All five bundled classifier agent YAMLs (hedge, commit-hygiene, fragility, work-quality, unauthorized-action) use bare model ids and are all affected. The decision is what 'model:' means in an agent spec at the framework level.
decision: Bare model ids in an agent spec resolve against the current session's configured provider via ExtensionContext. If ExtensionContext cannot supply a current-provider/current-model binding, the dispatch errors with a clear message naming the missing context. Fully-qualified model specs (provider/model) continue to pin the provider regardless of session. Pinning is explicit, not a default. Implementation prerequisite: research on ExtensionContext currentModel availability in pi-agent-core must complete first.
consequences: pi-behavior-monitors' classifyViaAgent must read the current session model from ExtensionContext at dispatch time, not from the agent YAML
parseModelSpec semantics change — bare specs route through ExtensionContext lookup instead of returning provider='anthropic' as a default
The five bundled classifier YAMLs can remain with bare model ids and will now follow whatever provider the user has configured
If ExtensionContext does not currently expose currentModel, that becomes a prerequisite unblocker — opens a scope question into pi-agent-core that must be verified before implementation
Workflow per-step provider override (issue-064) becomes the symmetric problem for workflow agents; same resolution applies

references.label: DEC-0001 enactment + citation refresh (parseModelSpec line numbers 1091-1097 → 1173)
